name: No Crust Easter Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the ricotta and cream cheese together.
2. Add the eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
3. Stir in the vanilla extract.
4. Mix in the flour and sour cream until combined. Do not overmix; the batter should be loose.
5. Pour the mixture into a 10-inch springform pan.
6. Bake in an oven set to 325°F for about 1 hour, or until done.
Note: This recipe works well as advised by Nanny.
